recommendations.title: Cheeky
recommendations.overview: While scouting out apartments in London for her Venetian boyfriend, Carla rents an apartment overlooking the Thames. There, she meets a real estate agent by the name of Moira.

recommendations.title: Miranda
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Ferrara, a lonely innkeeper explores a series of relationships while awaiting her missing husband’s return from war.

recommendations.title: Frivolous Lola
recommendations.overview: In 1950s northern Italy, a woman tests her fiancé's love and passion by trying to break his commitment to premarital chastity.

recommendations.title: All Ladies Do It
recommendations.overview: After five years of marriage, Diana discovers the joys of adultery, claiming that she can save her failing relationship through betrayal.
